title: citrus × aurantium var. longifolia
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. longifolia, also known as bitter orange or long-flowered bitter orange, is a variety of the bitter orange tree, known for its distinctive long, narrow flowers and highly fragrant leaves. The medicinal properties of Citrus × aurantium var. longifolia include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve circulation, and reduce stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Citrus × aurantium var. longifolia can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
